name: @easymailing/sdk
description: Official Easymailing SDK for Node and TypeScript backends.

scripts.test: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && find test -name '*.test.mjs' -not -path 'test/e2e/*' -print0 | xargs -0 node --test
scripts.test:e2e: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && find test/e2e -name '*.e2e.test.mjs' -print0 | xargs -0 node --test
scripts.lint: echo '(node) lint deferred to a later plan'
scripts.check: pnpm generate && pnpm build && pnpm test
